name: campbooks
description: Let AI agents run your Campbooks inbox — triage, skim, documents, tasks, calendar, and email over MCP.

server_url.title: Campbooks server URL
server_url.description: https://app.campbooks.not-a-camp.com for Campbooks Cloud, or your self-hosted URL (no trailing slash)

mcp_key.title: MCP key
mcp_key.description: From Settings → API access → New client — the ‘MCP key’ shown once (client-id.client-secret)
